title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Great Neck, NY | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Great Neck, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Bats in your Great Neck attic or chimney? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bat removal and exclusion services throughout Great Neck and the North Shore of Long Island. Our licensed technicians safely remove bats and seal entry points to prevent future infestations, protecting your home and family from health risks associated with bat guano and droppings.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Great Neck's diverse residential communities—from historic estates near Kings Point to modern homes in Kensington—we understand the unique pest challenges of North Shore properties. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane bat exclusion techniques that comply with New York wildlife protection laws.
localContext: Great Neck's tree-lined neighborhoods, proximity to Manhasset Bay, and mix of Tudor, Colonial, and contemporary architecture create ideal roosting conditions for bats in attics, soffits, and chimneys. Our technicians are familiar with the construction styles throughout Great Neck Plaza, Kings Point, and surrounding villages, ensuring thorough inspections and effective exclusion solutions.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Great Neck typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Great Neck safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes. We follow New York State guidelines for humane bat exclusion, using one-way doors and exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not re-enter. We never harm bats and time our services to avoid maternity season when flightless young are present.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Great Neck home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or squeaking sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of bat droppings (guano) in attics or around your home's exterior, and sightings of bats entering or exiting your roof or chimney at sunset.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bat removal service in Great Neck?
faqs.answer: We offer prompt emergency response for Great Neck residents, often providing same-day or next-day inspections. Once we assess the situation, we'll create a customized exclusion plan. Complete bat-proofing typically takes 1-3 days depending on your property's size and complexity.
